name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Recipient Host
notes:
This Building Block identifies recipient hosts that are not in the Corporate Email Domains reference set. 

Note: The Corporate Email Domains reference set must be populated.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Recipient Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event matches Recipient Host (custom) is not N/A
when any of Recipient Host (custom) are contained in any of Corporate Email Domains - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Recipient Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches Recipient Host (custom) is not N/A
AND NOT when any of Recipient Host (custom) are contained in any of Corporate Email Domains - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
